test.name: EDGE02 - Caracteres Especiais XSS

kw.name: Abrir Navegador
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
Abre o browser e acessa o site

kw.name: Preencher Campo Nome
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Preenche o campo de nome

kw.name: Preencher Campo Email
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Preenche o campo de email

kw.name: Submeter Formulário
Click Button

test.name: SEC001 - SQL Injection no Campo Nome

kw.name: Abrir Navegador
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
Abre o browser e acessa o site

kw.name: Preencher Campo Nome
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text '' OR '1'='1' into text field '//input[@name="pessoa.nome"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Preenche o campo de nome

kw.name: Preencher Campo Email
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Preenche o campo de email

kw.name: Preencher Campo Telefone
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

test.name: SEC005 - SQL Injection com UNION

kw.name: Abrir Navegador
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
Abre o browser e acessa o site

kw.name: Preencher Campo Nome
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text '' UNION SELECT NULL --' into text field '//input[@name="pessoa.nome"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Preenche o campo de nome
